articles.title: REACH MILLIONS OF TECH DECISION-MAKERS WITH TLDR
articles.summary: Advertising in TLDR puts your brand directly in front of tech leaders when they're most engaged. With 10 interest-based newsletters, you can easily reach a targeted audience of developers, PMs, marketers, and executives. Learn more about advertising with us [4].

articles.title: ANTHROPIC'S LLM FOR EDUCATION
articles.summary: Anthropic has introduced Claude for Education, which has features like Learning Mode to promote critical thinking and broad university access through partnerships with major institutions and education platforms.

articles.title: CLAUDE AVAILABLE FOR U.S. GOVERNMENT USE
articles.summary: Claude has achieved FedRAMP High and IL-2 compliance through Google Cloud's Vertex AI, making it usable by federal agencies and defense organizations with strict security needs.

articles.title: META AND UFC PARTNER TO ENHANCE FAN ENGAGEMENT WITH AI AND VR
articles.summary: Meta Platforms and the Ultimate Fighting Championship (UFC) have entered a multiyear partnership to integrate Meta's AI and VR technologies into UFC events. This collaboration aims to provide fans with immersive experiences using platforms like Meta Quest and AI-powered glasses. Meta's branding will feature in the UFC's Octagon during events and Threads will serve as the official social media partner. Financial terms were not disclosed.

articles.title: PAPER BENCH
articles.summary: OpenAI has released a new benchmark for academic paper creation. It requires full replication of certain papers, including understanding their experiments, results, and creation of novel ideas.

articles.title: GEOMETRY CRAFTER
articles.summary: A powerful model that uses video diffusion as a prior for consistent geometry estimation over time. It runs about 1.5 FPS for full point cloud estimation and can also do proper camera pose estimation.

articles.title: ENHANCED CELL SEGMENTATION
articles.summary: CellVTA improves vision transformer-based models for cell instance segmentation by injecting high-resolution spatial features through a CNN-based adapter, achieving state-of-the-art performance on multiple datasets.

articles.title: DSO: ALIGNING 3D GENERATORS WITH SIMULATION FEEDBACK FOR PHYSICAL SOUNDNESS
articles.summary: Most 3D synthesized data is generated for aesthetic quality. However, that means that when they are put into physics environments, they cannot stand up or be self supported. This work fine-tunes a model slightly to make it more physically plausible.

articles.title: MEDICAL REASONING DATASET
articles.summary: A large-scale medical reasoning dataset built to support faithful and explainable problem-solving in LLMs that aims to push forward research in medical AI.

articles.title: DEEPMIND'S STUDY FOR KERNEL FUZZING
articles.summary: Snowplow is a kernel fuzzer with a learned white-box mutator that improves test mutation efficiency, significantly increasing code coverage and bug discovery in Linux kernel fuzzing.

articles.title: SATYA NADELLA: DEEPSEEK IS THE NEW BAR FOR MICROSOFT'S AI SUCCESS
articles.summary: Microsoft CEO Satya Nadella emphasized the importance of turning AI research into successful products following an $80 billion AI investment. The company is focused on improving its AI offerings, like Copilot and Muse, while ensuring investments align with sustainability goals. Microsoft aims to be carbon-negative by 2030 despite challenges posed by increased AI workloads.

articles.title: ALPHABET'S AI DRUG DISCOVERY PLATFORM ISOMORPHIC LABS RAISES $600M FROM THRIVE
articles.summary: Isomorphic Labs, spun out of DeepMind, raised $600 million from Thrive Capital to further develop its AI drug design platform. The funding will also support hiring top researchers and advancing discovered drugs to clinical trials. Notably, Isomorphic Labs has partnerships with Eli Lilly and Novartis for its AI model.

articles.title: THE HOTTEST AI MODELS, WHAT THEY DO, AND HOW TO USE THEM
articles.summary: This article outlines the top AI models released since 2024, highlighting their uses and strengths. Notable models include OpenAI's GPT-4.5 Orion, which has strong world knowledge; Google's Gemini 2.5 Pro, focused on coding; and Cohere's Aya Vision, which excels in image tasks. The overview aims to simplify navigating the rapidly evolving AI landscape.

articles.title: DEEPSITE OPEN SOURCE CANVAS (HUGGING FACE HUB)
articles.summary: DeepSite is a DeepSeek powered open source canvas for “vibe coding” that updates apps in real time while the system writes the code.

articles.title: NOTEBOOKLM ADDS WEB-BASED SOURCE DISCOVERY
articles.summary: Google's NotebookLM now includes a Discover feature that pulls in curated web sources based on a user-defined topic, streamlining research and information gathering.

articles.title: AI-POWERED CONVERSATIONAL VIDEOS
articles.summary: Tavus uses Llama 3.3 to power realistic AI-generated video conversations by combining visual question-answering and multi-image reasoning for lifelike digital interactions.
